children.text: ROBLOX SUPER RICH HEROES $$$$ Iron Man Duddy vs Batman Chase SUPERHERO TYCOON (FGTEEV #16 Gameplay)

Duddy & Chase are SUPER Heroes in this Roblox Vid and they are getting RICH. $$$$$ Lots of $$$$ to build their awesome headquarters where they can buy weapons and cool upgrades for max Marvel Super Hero fun! Super Hero Characters from Marvel Comics and DC Domics that you can be include Incredible
KIDNAPPED in MINECRAFT!! FGTEEV MIRROR MAZE Family Challenge! Save DUDDY Mini-Game (Gameplay / Skit)

FGTEEV DUDDY has been taken hostage by an evil space alien known as Pick'lê ... he won't release him until the family can beat his Mirror Maze Challenge in under 45 seconds! WILL THEY WIN? WHO WILL BEAT THE TIME TO BEAT!?! Will Duddy survive?? Watch to find out and then Thumbs up if you enjoyed
